risk.desc: Risk of damage during handling due to insufficient structural reinforcement.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect assembly sequence leading to structural failure.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with step-by-step instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion mismatch between materials causing stress.
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients.
